channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bernie Sanders proposes $1,000 annual payment from AI company stakes
item.description: The senator's bill would give Americans 50% ownership of major AI companies if they become profitable.

item.title: Entry-level jobs have changed, not disappeared, PwC finds
item.description: Employers are raising requirements for entry-level roles, making them harder for young workers to obtain, says PwC's chief AI officer.

item.title: Trump-Iran agreement criticized for leniency on nuclear violations
item.description: The memo's only nuclear requirement is reversible down-blending of enriched uranium, which critics say gives Iran a free pass.

item.title: Son of pro-crypto Senator Gillibrand raises $30 million for derivatives exchange
item.description: Lux Capital led the investment, valuing the Stanford graduate's exchange at $300 million.
